description: Midpage provides legal research data and tools over a large corpus of U.S. court opinions, statutes, and regulations. Its product supports legal search, citation analysis, and document-oriented research workflows for lawyers and software teams.
summary: Midpage exposes a REST API at `http://app.midpage.ai/api/v1`, an OAuth- or API-key-authenticated MCP server at `https://app.midpage.ai/mcp` (plus versioned MCP endpoints), and an enterprise PostgreSQL read replica documented for developers.
